case_title: NGUYEN KIM VS BRADEN DERYL R

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY NGUYEN KIM AS TO DEFENDANT BRADEN DERYL R ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
